expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Build persistent notification center with unread controls, filtering, and clear-read actions.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state persisted so that read and unread status remains across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add persistent fields to store notification read state and read timestamp per user-notification record",
        "Existing notifications default to unread when read state is missing",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/*notification-read-state*",
        "src/db/schema/notifications.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Provide notification center queries with unread count",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification center data and unread totals so that the UI can display list content and badge counts.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add query to fetch user notifications with read state and ordering by newest first",
        "Add query or aggregate field to return unread notification count for current user",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/query*",
        "src/api/notifications/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Implement mark read and mark unread actions",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I control what remains in my unread queue.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Expose mutation to set read state for a notification owned by current user",
        "Marking read updates read timestamp; marking unread clears read timestamp",
        "Unread count is recalculated after successful read-state mutation",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/updateReadState*",
        "src/api/notifications/*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list panel",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge and notification list UI so that I can quickly see and open notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Header or nav shows unread badge count from notification query",
        "Opening notification center displays notification list with read/unread visual state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationBadge.*",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter notification list by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notification list by read state so that I can focus on unread or previously handled items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification center includes filter options All, Unread, and Read",
        "Selected filter updates displayed list without losing read-state indicators",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationFilters.*",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that the list keeps focus on items that still need attention.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide action to remove or archive all read notifications for current user only",
        "Notification center updates list and unread badge after clear-read action",
        "Tests pass",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/notifications/clearRead*",
        "src/components/notifications/ClearReadButton.*",
        "src/components/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
